title: cassia mimosoides subsp. nomame
intro: Cassia mimosoides subsp. nomame, also known as Nomame or Cassia nomame, is a plant species within the legume family, Fabaceae, native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and alleviating coughs and respiratory issues. Cassia mimosoides subsp. nomame is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
